reference: Hello, welcome to the clinic. This does not cause a pregnancy, because as you mentioned, you recently underwent a medical abortion, so ovulation is out of the question. For pregnancy, both sperm and an egg are necessary, and in your case, the presence of an egg is not feasible. I hope this information helps.
